title: Elgandal Fort
tagline: Elgandal Fort — heritage city of Telangana

overview.short: Elgandal Fort is situated amidst palm groves on the banks of the Manair River (a tributary of the Godavari River), approximately 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from Karimnagar on the Sirci
overview.description: Elgandal Fort is situated amidst palm groves on the banks of the Manair River (a tributary of the Godavari River), approximately 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from Karimnagar on the Sircilla Road in the Indian state of Telangana. It was once under the control of the Qutub Shahi dynasty, the Mughal Empire, and the Nizams of Hyderabad. During the Nizam era it was the headquarters of Karimnagar. It is believed that a secret tunnel connects Elgandal Fort and Manakondur some 9 kilometres (5.6 mi) from Karimnagar on the Karimnagar-Vemulawada highway.

topPlaces.name: Ganneruvaram
topPlaces.description: Ganneruvaram is a mandal in Karimnagar District, Telangana.

topPlaces.name: Ganneruvaram mandal
topPlaces.description: Ganneruvaram is a mandal in Karimnagar district of Telangana state, India. It is a new mandal.

topPlaces.name: Venkatraopalle
topPlaces.description: Venkatraopalle is a municipal village in Boinpalle mandal of Karimnagar district in the state of Telangana, India. It lies exactly 18 km away from Karimnagar, located on the highway from Karimnagar to Vemulawada.

topPlaces.name: Mid Manair Dam
topPlaces.description: Mid Manair Dam is a major irrigation project across the Manair River, at Manwada Village, Boinpalli Mandal, Rajanna Sircilla district, Telangana. It has a capacity of 25.87 tmcft with 25 radial gates.

topPlaces.name: Karimnagar
topPlaces.description: Karimnagar, formerly known as Elagandula, is a city and District Headquarters in the Indian state of Telangana. Karimnagar is a major urban agglomeration in the state.

topPlaces.name: Vadlur
topPlaces.description: Vadlur or vadloor is a village in Bejjanki mandal, Siddipet district, Telangana, India.

topPlaces.name: Lower Manair Dam
topPlaces.description: Lower Manair Dam also known as LMD was constructed across the Manair River, at Alugunur village, Thimmapur mandal, Karimnagar District, in the Indian state of Telangana during 1974 to 1985. It provides irrigation to a gross command area of 163,000 hectares (400,000 acres).

topPlaces.name: Kothapalli (Haveli)
topPlaces.description: Kothapalli (Haveli) (Telugu: కొత్తపల్లి), or Kothapalli, is a Revenue Village and a semi-town in Kothapalli Mandal, Karimnagar district, Telangana, India. The village used to be in the Karimnagar mandal of the old Karimnagar district.

Kothapalli (Haveli) (Telugu: కొత్తపల్లి), or Kothapalli, is a Revenue Village and a semi-town in Kothapalli Mandal, Karimnagar district, Telangana, India. The village used to be in the Karimnagar mandal of the old Karimnagar district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Elgandal Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Elgandal Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Elgandal Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (146 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (124 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Elgandal Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Elgandal Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Elgandal Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Elgandal Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Elgandal Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ganneruvaram, Ganneruvaram mandal, Venkatraopalle, Mid Manair Dam, Karimnagar.
